title: DFD Generator
description: Intelligent system that automatically generates Data Flow Diagrams from textual requirements using NLP and graph-based algorithms.
long_description: This project showcases an Agentic AI-powered system that autonomously generates Data Flow Diagrams (DFDs) and performs STRIDE-based threat analysis. Leveraging GPT-4o-mini with tool-calling, it analyzes codebases, infers architectures, identifies security risks, and produces Mermaid diagrams,enabling intelligent, end-to-end cybersecurity modeling with minimal human intervention.
highlights: Automated DFD generation from natural language requirements

title: PDF-Based AI Chatbot
description: Conversational AI that reads PDFs and provides accurate, context-aware answers using RAG architecture.
long_description: Intelligent conversational AI system that reads and understands PDF documents to provide accurate, context-aware answers. Built using advanced NLP and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture for domain-specific question answering.
highlights: RAG-based architecture for accurate document Q&A
PDF text extraction and chunking pipeline
Vector similarity search for relevant context retrieval

title: Sponsor Recommendation System
description: Advanced recommendation engine using collaborative filtering and content-based algorithms.
long_description: SponsorMatch is a smart matching tool that helps event organizers quickly find suitable sponsors. It ranks sponsors based on event vision, target industry, audience size, and frequency, combining text insights with data features. The system delivers top matches with clear explanations and downloadable results, making sponsor selection faster, more accurate, and scalable.
highlights: Cold-start problem handling with fallback strategies

title: Parking Connect
description: Smart parking management system connecting drivers with available spaces in real-time.
long_description: Smart parking management system that connects drivers with available parking spaces in real-time. Features include space availability tracking, booking system, and navigation assistance for urban parking optimization.
highlights: Admin dashboard for parking space management
